title: Topic browser page with layout and header
purpose: Displays a full page for browsing topics with filtering capabilities, including a header and navigation actions.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named TopicBrowserPage that wraps the TopicBrowser component with layout and header elements, handling topic selection and navigation.

steps.content: Accept props including optional topic selection callback and class name.
Define a callback function to handle topic selection with default navigation behavior.
Render the layout container with the provided class name.
Display a header with title, subtitle, breadcrumbs, and a new topic action button.
Render the topic browser component inside a scrollable container.
Check if a topic selection callback is provided.
IF a callback exists, invoke it with the topic name.
ELSE navigate to the topic detail page using window location.
